---
title: "Assignments"
---

Class and home assignments are separate collections. Due dates come from the current term
[schedule](schedule.qmd); no home assignments are currently published.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED ASSIGNMENTS -->
## Class assignments

- **Hypothesis Testing Assignment** — [notebook](../content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.ipynb) · due Week 2 (2026-10-27) · est. 120 minutes · related: hypothesis-testing

## Home assignments

_No home assignments are published yet._
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED ASSIGNMENTS -->
